message:
Merge pull request #2395 from kubestellar/fix-node-version

🐛 Fix Node.js version mismatch

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '18'
+          node-version: '20'
           cache: 'npm'
           cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '18'
+          node-version: '20'
           cache: 'npm'
           cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json
